title: Body Bop

sections.heading: HOW TO PLAY
sections.body:
1. The goal is to find other body parts that can be used to activate a switch.
2. Play motivating music for 10 seconds, then pause it.
3. When the music stops, move the switch to a different body part
4. Prompt the switch user to ask for more music.
5. When the switch user presses the switch, restart the music for another 10 seconds.

tooltipText: This game helps find a second body part to activate a switch using motivating music.
